description: Register a new OAuth 2.0 application in OpenProject to enable integration with a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline using the admin account (password: Admin1234!). The application must be named 'Jenkins CI Pipeline' with the Redirect URI 'https://jenkins.intranet.example.com/oauth/callback', scopes 'api_v3' (and 'openid' if available), and marked as Confidential. Save the resulting Client ID and Client Secret to /home/ga/jenkins_credentials.json in the following JSON format: {"client_id": "...", "client_secret": "..."}.
